title: GEEPAS Steam Iron | Clothes Dry & Steam Press | 30s Fast Heat-Up, Vertical Steaming | Nonstick Soleplate, Adjustable Temperature | 120ml Water Tank with 0.5g/Steam Output | 2 Year Warranty 1800W Gold
features: ✅ POWERFUL 1800W PERFORMANCE, FAST HEAT-UP – The Geepas Steam irons deliver quick 30 seconds heat-up and efficient ironing. It ensures faster crease removal, making ironing effortless and saving time on busy mornings.

✅ NONSTICK SOLEPLATE – The flat iron is equipped with a nonstick soleplate, iron steamer glides seamlessly over all fabric types without snagging or burning. The thick soleplate ensures even heat distribution for a professional finish.

✅ ADJUSTABLE TEMPERATURE, VARIABLE STEAM CONTROL – Lightweight steam irons feature a customizable thermostat dial to suit fabrics like cotton, silk, linen, wool, and synthetics. Choose from continuous steam (12g/min) or steam burst (0.5g/min) for stubborn creases.

✅ LARGE 120ML WATER TANK, POWERFUL STEAM OUTPUT – Equipped with a 120ml water tank, this steam iron ensures long ironing sessions. Delivers a continuous steam flow of 12g/min and a steam boost of 0.5g/min, effectively removing stubborn creases for crisp, professional results.
✅ SAFETY FUNCTION – The heat-resistant, shockproof ergonomic handle ensures a secure grip, making ironing comfortable and safe.
✅ ENERGY-EFFICIENT DESIGN – The energy-efficient design ensures powerful iron press output while optimizing power consumption.
description: Product Description Adjustable Temperature Geepas 1800W Steam Iron with adjustable temperature, non-stick soleplate, and powerful steam functions for effortless wrinkle removal. Powerful Steam Boost Geepas 1800W Steam Iron delivers a powerful steam boost for stubborn creases, ensuring smooth and effortless ironing on all fabric types. Powerful Crease Removal Effortlessly remove stubborn creases with powerful steam boost, ensuring smooth, wrinkle-free clothes in no time. Perfect for all fabric types. 120ml Water Tank With a 120ml water tank, enjoy uninterrupted steaming power, perfect for tackling large batches of clothes and removing stubborn wrinkles. Multi Functioning Ironing Experience multi-functioning ironing with versatile features-dry, steam, spray, burst of steam, and vertical steam for every fabric type and garment. Non Stick Soleplate The non-stick soleplate ensures a smooth glide over all fabrics, preventing stains and burns for a flawless ironing experience every time. Quick Heating With quick heating capabilities, this iron reaches the perfect temperature swiftly, saving you valuable time while ensuring optimal performance. Spray Nozel The precision-engineered spray nozzle ensures even distribution of water, providing optimal results across various fabric types.
